scenario.name: UAC REGISTER (basic)
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:a@ims.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:a@ims.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:a@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
